nodes.label: AI as routine task handler
nodes.grounding_span: For routine things like inquiries about shipping policies, the AI does most of the work but I double check it.

nodes.label: AI with personal feel and empathy
nodes.grounding_span: I'm looking for them to judge the tone of my response to see if it's appropriate.

nodes.label: AI as enhancement tool not replacement
nodes.grounding_span: I catch enough mistakes with the AI to know that it's there to augment my abilities and I don't fear them taking them over.

nodes.label: AI with company-specific knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: Ideally I'd like to have a database with a custom AI that is specifically built for our company, with knowledge of our products, processes, workflow, inventory, etc.

nodes.label: Customer satisfaction and retention
nodes.grounding_span: the goal is ideally to make them go away, but I always run it by my AI bot to see what they think.

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: For routine things like inquiries about shipping policies, the AI does most of the work but I double check it.

nodes.label: Human judgment and nuanced understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I catch enough mistakes with the AI to know that it's there to augment my abilities and I don't fear them taking them over.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: For routine things like inquiries about shipping policies, the AI does most of the work but I double check it.

nodes.label: Positive toward AI as emotional support
nodes.grounding_span: The AI would not sympathize or help me resolve my problems by understanding that I had a unique situation and instead just kept instructing me to do the same thing that I've already done.

nodes.label: Confidence in AI as a key skill
nodes.grounding_span: I catch enough mistakes with the AI to know that it's there to augment my abilities and I don't fear them taking them over.

nodes.label: Aspiration for custom company AI
nodes.grounding_span: Ideally I'd like to have a database with a custom AI that is specifically built for our company.

nodes.label: Strategic task delegation — uses AI only for specific, bounded tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I review the solution that the AI comes up with, but in difficult cases where I've exhausted all options, I look to AI for ways to de-escalate and resolve the problem.

nodes.label: Empathy-first communication — prioritizes tone and customer feeling
nodes.grounding_span: the goal is ideally to make them go away, but I always run it by my AI bot to see what they think.
